name: [Redacted] — Data & Backend Professional
headline: Information Technology Manager | Backend Engineer | Data Scientist
about: Experienced in data science, backend engineering, and team leadership with a strong academic background in computer science. Research focus on secure and privacy-preserving federated learning systems.

education.title: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.organization: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals (KFUPM)
education.description: Fully funded scholarship. Research focus: Secure and privacy-preserving federated learning systems.

education.title: Bachelor of Computer Science (Informatics)
education.description: Graduated in 3.5 years. Specialization in Machine Learning and Backend Engineering. Assistant Lecturer for Operating Systems (Linux).

experiences.title: Information Technology Manager
experiences.description: Translated business requirements into technical requirements and advised CEO on product development. Led product development and managed tasks for engineers (code review, database design, bug fixes).

experiences.title: Teaching Assistant
experiences.organization: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals
experiences.description: Graded assignments and proctored exams for courses in NLP, Secure Software Development, Information Security, and Operating Systems. Assisted in lab sessions for Web Engineering & Development.

experiences.title: Backend Engineer
experiences.description: Migrated databases for Bakti Palapa Ring project. Rewrote codebase from PHP to Python. Maintained and improved system performance. Collaborated across backend, frontend, and product teams.

experiences.title: Data Scientist
experiences.description: Enhanced SkillAcademy search with ElasticSearch. Conducted experiments on text processing for Roboguru. Maintained and scaled data science services.

experiences.title: Data Team Lead
experiences.description: Supervised data scientists, engineers, and DBAs. Coordinated product development direction with product owner. Ensured data availability for operations.

experiences.title: Data Scientist
experiences.description: Built recommendation systems from research to production. Applied Python optimization with parallel processing. Maintained scripts and collaborated with engineers.

experiences.title: Apprentice Mentor
experiences.description: Mentored Associate Data Scientists during internships. Helped prepare and deliver project reports to stakeholders.

experiences.title: Software Engineer Intern
experiences.description: Developed employee data web app using PHP, jQuery, Chart.js, MySQL. Assisted in internal employee training sessions.

volunteering.title: Branding and Communication
volunteering.organization: Persatuan Pelajar dan Mahasiswa Indonesia Dhahran
volunteering.description: Managed branding and communication for Indonesian student organization in Saudi Arabia.

volunteering.title: Educational Staff
volunteering.description: Co-instructor and speaker at workshops and seminars. Organized and co-instructed a data science club at Trunojoyo University.
